title: Shorea suavis
intro: Shorea suavis, commonly known as the "Malaysian silk tree," is a species of tree in the family Dipterocarpaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, as well as protection against cardiovascular diseases. Shorea suavis is rich in bioactive constituents including flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which contribute to its therapeutic effects. In traditional medicine, the plant is often used to prepare various herbal formulations, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions.

Further research is needed to fully understand the health benefits of Shorea suavis.
properties: Shorea suavis is a plant species known for its potential therapeutic properties.
